Package grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196.model

Class Ech0196ListOfSecurities

java.lang.Object
grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196.model.Ech0196ListOfSecurities
public class Ech0196ListOfSecurities extends Object
Securities section (Wertschriftenverzeichnis) of the eCH-0196 tax statement.
